    • Uses of MangooTemplateEngineException in io.mangoo.email

      Methods in io.mangoo.email that throw MangooTemplateEngineException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Mail Mail.htmlMessage​(String template, Map<String,​Object> content)
      Adds html message text which uses a given template and content to render
      Mail Mail.textMessage​(String template, Map<String,​Object> content)
      Adds plain message text which uses a given template and content to render
